science.title: Designed around skin signals, not trends.
science.subtitle: Every serum has a precise role inside a complete skincare ritual.

glow.title: Glow
glow.description: Freshness, visible energy and a more even-looking tone.

hydration.title: Hydration
hydration.description: Daily comfort, moisture support and barrier care.

repair.title: Repair
repair.description: Night care for recovery, comfort and wrinkle-focused support.

calm.title: Calm
calm.description: Support for redness-prone skin and a softer-feeling barrier.

firmness.title: Firmness
firmness.description: Elasticity, structure and care for a firmer-looking appearance.

youth.title: Youth
youth.description: Support for graceful aging and a healthier-looking glow.

radiance.title: Radiance
radiance.description: Clarity, light and a refined luminous finish.

auroraRoutine.title: Your skin ritual, composed intelligently.
auroraRoutine.subtitle: Aurora reads skin type, concerns, budget and active promotions to build a focused routine instead of showing random products.
auroraRoutine.fallback: Selected because it matches your skin profile.

reasons.dry_sensitive_redness: Chosen first because your profile shows dry, sensitive skin with redness.
